name: nonprofit finance teams managing 5–15 grants/month tool
description: For nonprofit finance teams processing 5–15 grants/month, inefficient reporting causes compliance issues. We streamline application and reporting instead of manual tracking and reporting via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient grant application and reporting processes
